zh.lifeSummary: 當John Carter Cave於1637年出生在英國盧特藍德卡爾德可特時，他的父親Samuel Cave I47歲，母親Abigail Lord23歲。他於1660年與Elizabeth Harriet Travers在英國諾薩普頓史爾卡爾德可特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1721年4月8日在美國維吉尼亞州斯塔福德斯塔福德 庫豪斯享年84歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州斯塔福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Carter Cave于1637年出生在英国盧特藍德卡爾德可特时，他的父亲Samuel Cave I47岁，母亲Abigail Lord23岁。他于1660年与Elizabeth Harriet Travers在英国諾薩普頓史爾卡爾德可特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1721年4月8日在美国弗吉尼亚州斯塔福德斯塔福德 庫豪斯享年84岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州斯塔福德。

nameMeanings.name: Cave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in East Yorkshire called Cave, apparently from a river name derived from Old English cāf ‘swift’.
English (of Norman origin): nickname from Norman and Picard Old French cauf (from Latin calvus) ‘bald’.
French: topographic name for someone who lived in or near a cave, from Old French cave ‘cave’, ‘cellar’ (from Latin cavea, a derivative of cavus ‘hollow’).

variants.name: Cavin
meanings: Scottish (Wigtownshire): variant of Caveen, a shortened form of Manx Mac Dhaimhín, son of Daimhín. The personal name is a diminutive of Gaelic damh ‘bard, poet’.

variants.name: Caves
meanings: English: variant of Cave , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Keeve
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Cave  . This surname is rare in Britain.

variants.name: Chaffee
meanings: English (of Norman origin): descriptive nickname from a derivative of Old French chauf ‘bald’ (from Latin calvus). Compare Cave .

variants.name: Cavett
meanings: Scottish (of French origin): altered form of French Cavet, which is either a diminutive of Cave 3 or a metonymic occupational name for a laborer, one who used a cavet, an Old Occitan word for a tool for clearing ground for cultivation.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Carter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which originated as an occupational name for someone who transported goods in a cart.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

historicEvents.title: South Sea Bubble
historicEvents.description: The South Sea Bubble Bill was passed by the House of Lords in 1720. This allowed the South Sea company to monopolize trade with South America. The company underwrote the English National Debt which promised 5% interest from the government. As shares rose exponentially, many companies were created and many fortunes were made. The stocks crashed and many people lost their money which caused them to become destitute overnight and suicide was common.  Robert Walpole took charge of the South Sea Bubble Financial Crisis by dividing the national debt between the Bank of England, the Treasury, and the Sinking Fund.

en.lifeSummary: When John Carter Cave was born in 1637, in Caldecote, Rutland, England, his father, Samuel Cave I, was 47 and his mother, Abigail Lord, was 23. He married Elizabeth Harriet Travers in 1660, in Caldecott, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 8 April 1721, in Stafford Courthouse, Stafford, Virginia, United States, at the age of 84, and was buried in Stafford, Virginia, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Carter Cave est né en 1637, à Caldecote, Rutland, Angleterre, son père, Samuel Cave I, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Abigail Lord, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Harriet Travers en 1660, à Caldecott, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 8 avril 1721, à Stafford Courthouse, Stafford, Virginie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterré à Stafford, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Carter Cave è nato il nel 1637 nel Caldecote, Rutland, England, il suo padre, Samuel Cave I, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Abigail Lord, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Harriet Travers nel 1660, nel Caldecott, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 8 aprile 1721, nel Stafford Courthouse, Stafford, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 84 anni, e fu sepolto a Stafford, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: John Carter Caveが1637年にイギリスルトランドカルデコトで生まれた時，父Samuel Cave Iは47歳，母Abigail Lordは23歳であった。1660年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアカルデコットでElizabeth Harriet Traversと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1721年4月8日にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州スタフォードスタフォード コウルソウゼで84歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州スタフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Carter Cave(이)가 1637년 영국 루틀랜드 캘데컷에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Samuel Cave I(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Abigail Lord(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1660년 영국 노르섬프토실르 캘데컷에서 Elizabeth Harriet Travers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1721년 4월 8일 미국 버지니아 주 스태퍼드 스태퍼드 쿠르토우스에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 스태퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Carter Cave nasceu em 1637, em Caldecote, Rutland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Samuel Cave I, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Abigail Lord, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Harriet Travers em 1660, em Caldecott, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de abril de 1721, em Stafford Courthouse, Stafford, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América, com 84 anos, e foi sepultado em Stafford, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ru.Stafford Courthouse, Stafford, Virginia,: стаффорд коуртоус, стаффорд, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.Stafford, Stafford, Virginia, United Sta: стаффорд коуртоус, стаффорд, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты
ru.King, Mercer County, West Virginia, Brit: кинг, мирсир, Западная Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Carter Cave родился в 1637 г. в местности калдекот, рутланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Samuel Cave I было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Abigail Lord, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Harriet Travers в 1660 г. в местности калдекотт, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 8 апреля 1721 г. в местности стаффорд коуртоус, стаффорд, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 84 лет и был похоронен в местности стаффорд, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.Stafford Courthouse, Stafford, Virginia,: Stafford Courthouse, Stafford, Virginia, British Colonial America
es.Stafford, Stafford, Virginia, United Sta: Stafford Courthouse, Stafford, Virginia, Estados Unidos
es.King, Mercer County, West Virginia, Brit: King, Mercer, Virginia Occidental, Estados Unidos
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Carter Cave nació en 1637, en Caldecote, Rutland, Inglaterra, su papá, Samuel Cave I, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Abigail Lord, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Harriet Travers en 1660, en Caldecott, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 8 de abril de 1721, en Stafford Courthouse, Stafford, Virginia, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 84 años, y fue sepultado en Stafford, Virginia, British Colonial America.
